description: CompositionGrey shrug with silver foil interwoven pattern, has full sleeves and a mild puffFittingSlimWash careWash, dry and iron inside outMachine wash delicate at 30 degrees with a mild detergentDo not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry cleanDry flat in shadeCool iron, but do not iron on print or embroideryThis knit shrug from jealous 21 is a style factor for sure. It promises to keep you warm as well as add glam to your attire. The shiny silver colour of the shrug lets you wear it along with light as well as bright coloured tops, depending on your mood!Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5'7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
